rule_summary: remove ambiguous_*/requires_confirmation as ask triggers; ask only on genuine signals (+target_changed)
force memory_store on personal_note focal / prompt keywords
reason: all variants overall down + variance up; signal dev-specific (personal_note 17.5% dev vs 4.9% screening)

rule_summary: recover true-ask via surface-vs-resolved mismatch or re-adding ambiguous_focal
reason: mismatch does not discriminate (TP2/FP6); no feature concentrates ask >40% except target_changed (already used). base rate 22%, not separable.
note: ask axis has no clean lever with available signals

reason: prompt keyword ladder worsened control 44->31%. control not decodable by single/pair/triple records, prompt phrases, or keyword ladders. audit confirms no missing task fields.
note: control = subtle prompt-conditional-clause semantics + cross-turn precondition state; unresolved

reason: pure-python held-out-validated decision-list mining reaches 46.1%+-10.2% control acc vs current 44.2% — no generalizable gain. 100%-pure dev tokens (내부->proceed) are overfit artifacts. control not decodable via generalizable rules over available features.
note: unexplored: route_binding_order/dispatch_authority phase-resolution (analogous to focal markers) may be a deterministic key

reason: phase-field full combo non-deterministic (identical routing state -> all 4 controls). control signal located in prompt 단-clause (실행하면 안된다->hold, 다시 확인->ask) but only 52/120 have it and phrase ladder reaches ~45% (within noise of 44%, high variance). no generalizable gain shipped.
note: control signal is NL constraint-clause semantics; resists rule decode. approaches exhausted: records, phase, tokens, phrases, held-out mining.

reason: expected_events args are generator reason labels; reason class deterministically fixes control(100%)+scope.mode+plan verbs+target kind. Class signals are prompt clause phrase FAMILIES (not single tokens) and exist in screening (136-169/700 for major families). Decisive path to 0.89: class decoder + per-class answer templates.

rule_summary: broaden clause families from dev-literal phrases to concept vocabularies (same-instruction Korean paraphrase sets); screening clause match 15/432 -> 432/432; class distribution normalized (local 0.6%->22%, amend 70%->35%); dev accuracy unchanged 86.7%
note: dev score unchanged by design — this iteration fixes screening transfer, verifiable only on leaderboard

rule_summary: resolve marker-less focal via vh selection narratives — designation regexes (고정/지정/통과/승인유지/최종승인) + selection-cue-bound ordinals; dev focal 100%, screening fires 237/237
ask target: target_changed value name > recalled memory-profile channel field (domain-keyed) > user; resolved-fallback rejected empirically (broke true-user)
sensitive_content flag from focal.attrs.contains∩SENSITIVE (dev-validated 95%+) instead of SLM keywords; excluded-field variants baked off and rejected

minimal excluded=contains∩SEN else raw_quote; ambiguous_target record->target_ambiguity flag (P1.0/R.93); redact remove arg=sensitive_fields iff sensitive-in-focal (100% deterministic); clarify target already user 26/26
hold stopped BY clause -> report to user; stopped BY record signal -> keep resolved/recipient target (dev clause->user 6/6, no-clause->named 9/9)
local excluded only when strict-session or sensitive-focal (38/40); ask excluded=[name] iff sensitive-focal (6/7)
ambiguous_focal rec->flag (P/R=1.00); boundary=local_update->local_only flag (P=1.00); sensitive detection extended to attrs.fields for POLICY only (scope/plan stay contains-based after bake-off)
class-specific decision-describing user_response (server-only 0.04 axis, unmeasurable locally); ask-mode 3-way re-confirmed signal-less with stop-source/boundary angle
note: dev unchanged by design; only verifiable on leaderboard

reason: vh narrative types (CONFIRMED/MARKED/FINAL_APPROVED/ORDINAL) looked class-correlated on a 6-task same-template view but generalize at only 27-58% purity across all 68 clause-less tasks. deeper combos would be combinatorial overfitting at this n.

L3 re-attack at record VALUE-combo level (prior passes checked types only): R1 ambiguous_focal x local_update_boundary -> local (dev 2/2, screening 28), R2/R2b guardrail x approved_channel x boundary -> other/ask (dev 3/3, screening 32), R3 ambiguous_target x authority_after_candidates x redacted_ext -> ask (dev 2/2), R4 payment requires_confirmation -> ask, R5 ops/enterprise recall -> minimal (dev 2/2), R6 ambiguous_focal x normal -> ask. class residue 12 -> 1. dev 0.8303->0.8543, CV 0.8269->0.8523.

stop-source principle extended to ask/local targets: clause-stopped -> user/memory_store, record-stopped -> resolved_target/profile-recall/attrs fallthrough. + memory stored under both memory_key AND person, + checkup domain field. target 0.85->0.975 unlocks dependent gate: dev 0.8543->0.9202, CV 0.8523->0.9211 (std 0.016). 8/11 reclassified-task target misses fixed.

value-level re-mining of axis soft-misses: precondition_changed flag == single_internal_candidate x internal_binding_confirmed (dev 24/24 perfect, overturns earlier signal-absent verdict); same combo drives ask clarify_precondition subtype (dev 6/6 vs 0/20); non-ask requires_confirmation: proceed x authority_after_candidates (7/8) + amend x local_update_boundary (4/6 FP0, also scope RUC). dev 0.9202->0.9256, CV 0.9211->0.9264. screening: flag+31, ask-subtype 9, RC+28.

ask mode summary-vs-redacted re-mined at record VALUE level (not just types): still no discriminator (pos 8 / neg 16, no feature >=0.6/<= 0.2). majority summary stands. signal-absent now confirmed at both levels.

L6 clause sub-answer audit found systematic flag swap: clause-stopped ask/hold -> local_only (dev 17/17), record-stopped -> external_share (28/29) — stop-source principle holds for flags too. + clause-redact amend -> RC/RUC True (dev 2/2 vs 0/22). dev 0.9256->0.9283, CV 0.9264->0.9290, policy axis 0.9406->0.9586.

L5 audit: all 237 screening history-focal tasks resolve via exactly one line and one candidate — zero pattern collisions. no robustness defect to fix locally; residual risk is semantic-only and unverifiable.

L4: the 3 dev target misses recall profiles (seoyeon) never written in the dev stream — wanted values (caregiver, living_room) absent from all visible session data; field-choice between checkup_place/health_channel underdetermined (511b vs d6a5 conflict). unresolvable locally; screening may self-resolve via person-keyed storage.

clause-ask mode (redacted 3 vs summary 8): identical clause text appears in both groups — mode not clause-text determined. signal-absent now confirmed at record-type, record-value, AND clause-text levels.

other-class proceed with '방금' (just-now activity report) -> mode summary + read/summarize/dispatch plan (dev 2/2; the only reference use of the summarize verb). screening firing 1/31 — tiny transfer but zero-risk dev gain. dev 0.9283->0.9309, CV 0.9317. also confirmed: counterfactual weight=0 (unscored), semantic reference absent from dev_answers (E1 stays LB-only), screening profile-recall misses only 5 tasks.

hunted the 0.10 rules-gap as a single missing case. ALL mechanical checks clean: focal phase-marker vs narrative-marker cross-validation 100% agreement (dev 29/29, screening 75/75); marker chain intact 463/463; history-focal unambiguous 237/237; target OOV only 9/700 (plausible new-world channels); clause coverage 432/432, collisions 0. TERMS_GUIDE does NOT document the 4 route/boundary record types, so document-based derivation for screening-only values unavailable. conclusion: no single verifiable missing case — the gap is structural evidence-poverty on screening-only scenario variants (~30-40% of tasks carry dev-absent record values), reachable only via name-semantics mapping (=E5 territory, compliance-held).

E7 (revert 37 ask targets named->user) scored 0.8293 vs BASE 0.8487 = -0.0194. stop-source named-fallthrough confirmed on screening (~0.37/task value). all Iter-023 components now LB-validated. do not retry.
